'''Sarlacc's Peak''' was a location in the [[Carbon Score Wastes]] on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]], surrounded by the city of [[Killee-Kor]]. During the timeframe of the [[Second Imperial Civil War]], the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Rav]] docked his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Crimson Axe]]'', within the peak. A [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] was said to live at the top, but it died [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
